name: python3-flask-restx
title: python3-flask-restx
summary: Fully featured framework for API development with Flask
description:
Fully featured framework for API development with Flask
This package contains an extension for Flask that adds support for quickly
building REST APIs. Flask-RESTX encourages best practices with minimal setup.
If you are familiar with Flask, Flask-RESTX should be easy to pick up. It
provides a coherent collection of decorators and tools to describe your API
and expose its documentation properly using Swagger.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flask-restx because Fully featured framework for API development with Flask.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flask-restx as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flask-restx with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flask-restx --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
